name: western-greek-yogurt-bowl
input: a bowl of full-fat Greek yogurt with honey, berries, and granola
notes: USDA composite: 200g full-fat Greek yogurt ~190 kcal P 16g F 10g, 15ml honey ~45 kcal, 50g mixed berries ~30 kcal, 30g granola ~115 kcal. Advisory tier — granola brand variability dominates the macro spread.
